category_sources: source_facts.description says Unix pager optimized for psql; official README describes pspg as a pager for tabular data with PostgreSQL and other database clients.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pspg; official GitHub repository is named okbob/pspg.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage, configuration, and installation documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/okbob/pspg; per instruction, repo not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies psql focus; official README covers PostgreSQL, MySQL, CSV, streaming, and pager use.
